nws_forecast.name: This Afternoon
nws_forecast.detailed: Showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 58. Southwest wind 5 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Rain Showers Likely then Mostly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain showers likely before 9pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 38. West wind 9 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 51. West wind around 16 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Snow Showers
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow showers between 2am and 4am, then a chance of rain and snow showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 35. West wind 5 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain and snow showers. Partly sunny, with a high near 46. West wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Rain And Snow Showers then Mostly Clear
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain and snow showers before 8pm. Mostly clear, with a low around 28. Northwest wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 46. West wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Clear, with a low around 34. South wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 55. South wind 8 to 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 43. South wind 8 to 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 63. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 44. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers after 10am. Partly sunny, with a high near 61. South wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers before 8pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 43. West wind around 8 mph.
